behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to the lines that changed, not the full content of each modified file.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is the handoff between diff-parsing/scoping logic and review-input assembly (multi-module local wiring). REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess is required; a local diff fixture is enough. LLM-DEP: this checks what text is sent to review, not model judgment quality. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System/Agentic because behavior text is about input scoping ('lines that changed'), which can be validated before any real API/model call.
behaviors.test_description: Run the review-input builder against a synthetic PR diff where unchanged file regions contain sentinel text; assert the emitted review payload includes only changed hunks and excludes unchanged sentinel regions.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request.
behaviors.justification: Real failure occurs at GitHub diff-position semantics (path/line/side/commit mapping) when posting comments. MOCK-HIDE: mocked API often accepts invalid mappings that real PR diff view rejects or anchors differently. REAL-INFRA => System.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, post inline comments using computed positions and then fetch review comments from GitHub; verify each returned anchor maps to the intended changed line in the PR diff view.

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a pull request that contains a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on model judgment quality (detecting a real bug), which varies with real LLM output. Deterministic stubs cannot validate this. REJECTION-GATE: rejected Integration because behavior text explicitly requires 'identifies at least one real defect,' i.e., output quality, not just plumbing.
behaviors.test_description: Use a real PR fixture with a seeded known bug and run live model analysis; pass if at least one finding correctly describes that bug location/type within acceptance criteria.

behaviors.description: Every finding listed in the top-level summary corresponds to a posted inline comment ID from the same run.
behaviors.justification: This is cross-module state consistency (finding registry -> posted comment IDs -> summary builder). No real OS/network/model output is required to catch mapping bugs; local IDs and run context are sufficient. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because behavior text focuses on same-run ID correspondence, which can be validated in-process.
behaviors.test_description: Simulate a run with multiple findings and posted inline comment responses, then build summary payload; assert every summary finding references an existing inline comment ID created in that run and none from prior runs.

behaviors.description: No inline finding is dropped from the final summary payload before posting.
behaviors.justification: Failure appears in local orchestration/serialization pipeline (collector -> dedupe/filter -> summary payload). REAL-INFRA/LLM not required if findings are fixed inputs. REJECTION-GATE: rejected Agentic because behavior text is completeness of payload transport, not quality of model-generated content.
behaviors.test_description: Feed a deterministic set of inline findings (including edge cases like duplicate paths/lines) through summary assembly and assert cardinality/content preservation rules match expected contract before post call.

behaviors.description: The automation sequence (read diff, post inline comments, post summary) succeeds for a real pull request when provided a fixed precomputed finding set.
behaviors.justification: Requires real GitHub API interactions and sequencing on an actual PR. MOCK-HIDE: mocked endpoints won’t expose real permission, anchor, ordering, or API contract issues. LLM-DEP is excluded by 'fixed precomputed finding set'.
behaviors.test_description: Run end-to-end against a real PR using precomputed findings; verify diff read succeeds, inline comments are created, summary posts, and run exits success with expected artifact IDs.

behaviors.description: The full live run with model-generated findings (read diff, analyze, post inline comments, post summary) completes correctly for a real pull request without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: Includes a real model decision step ('model-generated findings') plus real PR posting; correctness depends on non-deterministic LLM output and pipeline handling of that output. MULTI-STEP: only one explicitly agentic stage is required by behavior text, so Agentic is sufficient; Workflow not strictly required.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the live pipeline on a real PR with production model settings; assert unattended completion and valid posted artifacts (inline comments + summary linked to same run), with retries/timeouts handled automatically.
